computerdesk: ^It's a desk with a very old personal computer on it. This kind still takes floppy disks.
computerdesk_first: ^NOUR: "There's no operating system loaded on it. Looks like it's missing a floppy disk."
^NOUR: "A small card you had to put into old computers to get them to work."
^NOUR: "It's like a CD, before those were used."
^MS. SUWAN: "I didn't think people your age knew about floppy disks."
^NOUR: "My family was into old tech. Really old tech."
^NOUR: "I didn't even get my first phone until high school."
^MS. SUWAN: "A floppy disk. I do not believe there are any here, which is very strange."
^NOUR: "...Well, this seems like a dead end if it won't help us get out of here."
computerdesk_repeat: ^NOUR: Stupid computer doesn't work. I should find another way to get out of here.
